element_introduction_order.element: Basic attack buttons and directional pad

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Required for defense against opponent combos
Essential for advanced defensive play and punishing opponent attacks
Enables follow-up combos on downed opponents
Visual feedback system; indicates combo effectiveness
Three execution methods: sweep motions, charge moves, hold-release moves

typical_relief_triggers: Executing a Take Down to floor opponent
typical_tension_triggers: Being in disadvantaged position after failed block
Facing opponent mid-swing (requires precise deflect timing)
Low health approaching Death Combo threshold
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based escalation: early matches establish basic mechanics; mid-tournament introduces layered defensive and offensive systems; late matches demand mastery of all mechanics; final encounter (Demonlord Zarak) represents mechanical and narrative climax

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret password unlocks Demonlord Zarak as playable character and hidden final boss encounter; alternate story endings based on sparing or killing opponents via Death Combos

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial establishment of thrust-blocking and basic attack combinations; opponents introduce single special moves
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponents deploy layered Deflect counterattacks and Take Down knockdowns; player must master timing-based defensive mechanics and combo follow-ups
difficulty_curve.late_game: Opponents use full special move arsenals (9-12 moves each); Death Combo execution becomes critical; precision required in charge and hold-release move timing
notable_spikes: First introduction of Deflect mechanics (requires reorientation from pure offensive play)
Mid-tournament opponents combining Take Downs with floor combos
Final Demonlord Zarak encounter (highest move count, signature fatality, represents narrative prophecy fulfillment)

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear sequence of 1v1 matches against 20-25 champion warriors; each victory advances narrative toward Demonlord confrontation; story branches based on method of victory (sparing vs. Death Combo)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament matches 1-20 leading to final Zarak encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Developers compensated for 7-character roster limit by assigning 9-12 special moves per fighter; each opponent introduces different move timing challenges (sweeps, charges, holds); forces player to adapt defensively and learn multiple execution patterns
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Each tournament opponent presents unique special move architecture

notable_level_patterns.description: Password given after each match allows non-linear return to mid-tournament progress; removes failure penalty friction and emphasizes skill mastery over grinding; secret password grants Demonlord Zarak playable access
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All tournament matches support mid-game save/resume
